caption: A person is filming a sequence in a room with a table covered by a grey mat featuring palm tree graphics and the logos "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM". In the background, a "STAR WARS" box is visible. A man wearing a dark shirt is seen interacting with a gold-colored rectangular box. Initially, the man is positioned behind the table, reaching for the gold box. As the sequence progresses, he lifts the box and moves it across the table. He then opens the lid of the box, revealing its contents, and is seen standing beside the table looking toward the camera. The scene maintains a consistent indoor setting throughout, focusing on the movement and opening of the gold box on the branded mat.
